subcodes.first_line: O Ahmad! By God, the True One, His proof hath been perfected unto thee, and His testimony hath been made complete against thee, if thou be of them that comprehend [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا احمد تالله الحق قد تمت حجه الله علیک و جعل برهانه علیک بالغا ان انت من العارفین
subcodes.subjects: @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @knowledge; recognition of God
